name: cecropin_cluster_chr3R_99E
description: Drosophila AMP cluster: Cecropin antimicrobial peptide tandem cluster (CecA1, CecA2, CecB, CecC) at 99E. Tandem paralogs 70-98% identical with rapid evolution under pathogen pressure; population-level CNV. Useful for testing PSV-resolution in compact tandem arrays.
